name: mctl-pairdesk
description: PairDesk: a closed Telegram Mini App + bot where vetted community members post and match P2P exchange requests (EUR/RUB/USDT). A bulletin board, not an exchange: no custody, no payments, no escrow.

scripts.build: npm run build:landing && npm run build:web && npm run build:api
scripts.build:landing: cd landing && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.build:web: cd web && npm install && npm run build
scripts.test:expiry: npm run test:db:up && npm run build:api && node --test tests/integration/expiry.test.mjs
